en: Oh dear. So that's freaky. Didn't you see an elephant woman in Manchester? Yeah, yeah, leave that. What do you mean leave it?
No, cos it, it, it is sad. I know it's sad, but, but I mean, I don't know what my next sentence is.
Yeah, but people always think. That should be the end. I don't need to say anymore, people will know what she looks like.
ko: 뭐? 아기를 낳은... 아기를 낳고 있던 여자. (웃음) 반복해도 안 명확해.

en: It's a good name for her. Did she like buns? Oh dear.
ko: 아기를 낳은 여자의 아기? 더 안 읽어봤어?

en: It was when me, er, it's when me dad was a taxi driver and he used to sit in the front. Yeah. And she used to get a lot of taxis.
ko: 이상해서, 그 애가 학교에서 학부모 상담하는 걸 상상했어.

en: And er. And he only charged you half price, didn't he? He was a good guy. Well, the bad thing is as well with people like that, you don't want to offend them because they never forget.
ko: (웃음) 계속해. 네 아이는 잘하는데, 네 숙제를 봅시다, 뭐 그런 거.
뭐? 아이가 아기를 낳은 거야? 응. 당연히 아니지! 음악 틀어!

en: I was in, I was sat in the front of the cab and me dad goes right, we're going to go and pick the, er, you know, the, I can't even tell you the name, he's, he's just evil.
What do you mean? No, leave it, so she's got. No, no, no. Karl, tell me what he said. No. You've already stitched him up, he's thieving things from little Welsh fellas.
I don't care. Right, what did he call her? Steve. No. Karl, to be fair, our opinion of him is already pretty low.
Look, tell me what he said. No, it's not, I'm scared of what me dad gets, it's the person who's got the thing right.
She's not listening, is she? Well, her headphones wouldn't fit on her head. Tell me what he called her.
I don't want to. Tell me what he called her, Karl. I'm getting angry, man. Tell me what he called her. No, I'll leave that, honestly.
Tell me what he called her. It doesn't matter. Tell me what he called her. Karl, just. Steve. I'm going to go. I want to know what he called her.
Right, you're not going to stop this show. We're not doing the next show until you tell me what he called her. What did your father call the elephant head woman?
Tell me. Spore dead. How old were you?
I don't know, about nine. Did you like it? So did you expect to see a potato with a dress? He did sort of, again, it's a good name, do you know what I mean?
I had an idea of what it was going to be about and he said, do you want to stay in the car, I'll take you home because you can't. Spore dead, she's got lovely eyes.
